glosses.zh-Hans: 跳蚤市场; 二手市场
glosses.yue: 跳蚤市場; 二手市集
glosses.pt: mercado de pulgas; feira de usados
glosses.hi: फ्ली मार्केट; पुराने सामान का बाज़ार
glosses.ro: târg de vechituri; piață de vechituri
glosses.ja: フリーマーケット; フリマ

translations.en: We're going to the flea market later.
translations.es: Vamos al mercado de pulgas más tarde.
translations.fr: On va au marché aux puces plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们等会儿去跳蚤市场。
translations.ru: Мы позже пойдём на блошиный рынок.
translations.pt: Vamos ao mercado de pulgas mais tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לשוק הפשפשים אחר כך.
translations.vi: Lát nữa chúng mình sẽ đi chợ trời.
translations.nl: We gaan later naar de rommelmarkt.
translations.uk: Ми пізніше підемо на блошиний ринок.
translations.hi: हम बाद में फ्ली मार्केट जाएंगे.
translations.id: Nanti kita pergi ke pasar loak.
translations.ro: Mai târziu mergem la târgul de vechituri.
translations.ja: あとでフリーマーケットに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural, nominative); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present); agrees with the subject 'Wir'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu' + 'dem'); introduces a PP governing dative.
Common noun (dative singular here) as object of the preposition 'zum'.

sentences.target: Ich verkaufe Bücher auf dem Flohmarkt.

translations.de: Ich verkaufe Bücher auf dem Flohmarkt.
translations.en: I'm selling books at the flea market.
translations.es: Vendo libros en el mercado de pulgas.
translations.fr: Je vends des livres au marché aux puces.
translations.ru: Я продаю книги на блошином рынке.
translations.pt: Vendo livros no mercado de pulgas.
translations.vi: Tôi bán sách ở chợ trời.
translations.ar: أنا أبيع كتب في سوق البراغيث.
translations.nl: Ik verkoop boeken op de rommelmarkt.
translations.uk: Я продаю книги на блошиному ринку.
translations.hi: मैं फ्ली मार्केट में किताबें बेच रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya menjual buku di pasar loak.
translations.ro: Vând cărți la târgul de vechituri.
translations.ja: フリーマーケットで本を売っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative); subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1st singular); predicates the action.
Common noun (plural, accusative) functioning as the direct object.
Preposition selecting dative here (static location) to form a PP.
Definite article (dative singular, masculine) for 'Flohmarkt' within the PP.
Common noun (dative singular) as object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Lena findet eine Lampe auf dem Flohmarkt.
sentences.reading: /ˈleːna ˈfɪndət ˈaɪ̯nə ˈlampə aʊf deːm ˈfloːmaʁkt/

translations.de: Lena findet eine Lampe auf dem Flohmarkt.
translations.ipa: /ˈleːna ˈfɪndət ˈaɪ̯nə ˈlampə aʊf deːm ˈfloːmaʁkt/
translations.en: Lena finds a lamp at the flea market.
translations.es: Lena encuentra una lámpara en el mercado de pulgas.
translations.fr: Lena trouve une lampe au marché aux puces.
translations.it: Lena trova una lampada al mercatino.
translations.zh-Hans: Lena在跳蚤市场找到了一盏灯。
translations.yue: Lena喺跳蚤市場搵到一盞燈。
translations.ru: Лена нашла на блошином рынке лампу.
translations.pt: Lena encontra uma luminária no mercado de pulgas.
translations.tr: Lena bit pazarında bir lamba buluyor.
translations.vi: Lena tìm được một cái đèn ở chợ trời.
translations.ar: לينا عثرت على مصباح في سوق البراغيث.
translations.nl: Lena vindt een lamp op de rommelmarkt.
translations.uk: Лена знаходить лампу на блошиному ринку.
translations.hu: Lena talál egy lámpát a bolhapiacon.
translations.hi: लेना को फ्ली मार्केट में एक लैंप मिला.
translations.pl: Lena znajduje lampę na pchlim targu.
translations.el: Η Λένα βρίσκει μια λάμπα στο παζάρι.
translations.nb: Lena finner en lampe på loppemarked.
translations.id: Lena menemukan sebuah lampu di pasar loak.
translations.sv: Lena hittar en lampa på loppis.
translations.ro: Lena găsește o lampă la târgul de vechituri.
translations.cs: Lena najde na bleším trhu lampu.
translations.da: Lena finder en lampe på loppemarked.
translations.ja: レナはフリーマーケットでランプを見つけた。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd singular); agrees with 'Lena'.
Indefinite article (accusative feminine singular) modifying 'Lampe'.
Common noun (accusative singular) functioning as direct object.
Preposition selecting dative for a static location PP.
Definite article (dative singular, masculine) for 'Flohmarkt'.
Common noun (dative singular) as object of the preposition 'auf'.

translations.en: My dad loves the flea market.
translations.es: A mi papá le encanta el mercado de pulgas.
translations.fr: Mon père adore le marché aux puces.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爸特别喜欢跳蚤市场。
translations.yue: 我老豆好鍾意跳蚤市場。
translations.pt: Meu pai adora o mercado de pulgas.
translations.he: אבא שלי מאוד אוהב את שוק הפשפשים.
translations.vi: Bố tôi rất thích chợ trời.
translations.nl: Mijn vader is dol op de rommelmarkt.
translations.hi: मेरे पापा को फ्ली मार्केट बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου λατρεύει το παζάρι.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu adoră târgul de vechituri.
translations.ja: 父はフリーマーケットが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (nominative masculine singular) modifying 'Vater'.
Common noun (nominative singular); subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd singular); predicates the liking.
Definite article (accusative masculine singular) for 'Flohmarkt'.
Common noun (accusative singular) functioning as the direct object.
